g.text: Data Strangulation — five steps to migrate a data domain without downtime
Same two stores in every panel. What changes is who writes, who reads, and which direction CDC flows.
New store is source of truth.
weeks of soak per step, no step is irreversible until the previous is stable →
Anchor: read traffic flips 100/0 → 0/100; write traffic flips 100/0 → 0/100 — but the steps never overlap.
